rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 10, 2009, line 10, DEFENDANT NEAL MITCHELL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiff to amend unintelligible complaint. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: LIVEUNIVERSE, INC., VS. UNITEDLAYER, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 10, 2009, line 15, Plaintiff's Order to show cause re: preliminary injunction. Motion for preliminary injunction denied. Plaintiff fails to show a likelihood of success on the merits. Plaintiff is the party in breach, and is in default on September and October payments. Agreement entitles defendant to obtain a lien on the property. Although plaintiff may not be the proper party in this action, and "Live Video" is not registered in California the court does not make a determination regarding this issue in this decision. =(302/CWW)
